curvatureAnalyst.recommendation: Bend radius ≥3× trace width for impedance control

topologyAnalyst.recommendation: Star topology for clock; mesh for data

delayProber.recommendation: Match trace lengths within 50ps for DDR

errorDetector.recommendation: Series termination at driver; parallel at receiver

capProber.recommendation: Use X7R for decoupling; C0G for timing

recommendations: Bend radius ≥3× trace width for impedance control
Star topology for clock; mesh for data
Match trace lengths within 50ps for DDR
Series termination at driver; parallel at receiver
Use X7R for decoupling; C0G for timing

phase_1_immediate.title: Signal Integrity Hardening
actions: Add 33Ω series termination on all clock lines
Increase HDMI trace spacing to 0.3mm (3× width)
Replace high-ESR caps (>100mΩ) with low-ESR X7R

phase_2_structural.title: Topological Routing Optimization
actions: Match all DDR data trace lengths within 50ps
Implement star topology for clock distribution
Add guard traces between critical pairs

phase_3_power.title: Power Distribution Network Topology
actions: Reduce PDN impedance to <10mΩ up to 100MHz
Add ferrite beads on analog power rails

phase_4_topological.title: True Topological Device Transformation
actions: Add topological state machine for adaptive routing
Deploy swarm consensus for real-time topology optimization
